story.text:
# 📄 Spellweb First-Release Manifest v1
**document** · shared · knowledge

Machine-friendly canonical inventory of what spellweb v1.0 should ingest: 1 civic + 1 geography + 11 workshop + 16 cast + 13 vertex + 4 gateway nodes; 8 EdgeTypes with explicit instance counts; field name conventions. The self-referential spec — defines what spellweb knows about itself. Source: docs/tomes/specs/06-spellweb-first-release-manifest.md.
